content.full_text:
September 9, 2005

Mark Mitchell
128 Canyon Rim Drive
Folsom, CA 95630

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-175

Dear Mr. Mitchell:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice. As we discussed on September 7, 2005, the Commission provides written advice with respect to a person’s duties under the Political Reform Act. (Section 83114(b).) You are no longer a public official and, thus, have no current duties under the Political Reform Act. In addition, it appears that the questions you ask relate to past conduct and the Commission does not provide advice relating to past conduct. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(A).)

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Adrianne Korchmaros
Political Reform Consultant
